event: Raftsmen playing cards on the Mississippi
description: Four men sit on a wooden raft or flatboat on a wide river, playing cards. One wears a red shirt and top hat, standing or sitting above the others. The other three sit around a makeshift table or crate, studying their hands. They wear rough work clothes — white shirts, rolled-up sleeves, straw hats. The raft is made of rough-hewn planks with crates and equipment. The river stretches wide and calm behind them under a hazy sky with distant shore. A steamboat is faintly visible in the background.

_meta.title: In a Quandary, Or Mississippi Raftsmen at Cards
